prompt: View all delayed shipments from 'Superior Materials' and 'Reliable Suppliers Co', including order details, delivery performance, and costs.

app_definition.app_description: Detailed analysis of delayed shipments specifically for Superior Materials and Reliable Suppliers Co, focusing on delivery performance and cost impact.

components.sql_query: SELECT COUNT(*) as delayed_count FROM supply_chain WHERE on_time_delivery = 0 AND supplier IN ('Superior Materials', 'Reliable Suppliers Co')
components.title: Total Delayed Orders
Avg. Delivery Time (Delayed)
components.sql_query: SELECT AVG(delivery_days) as avg_delay FROM supply_chain WHERE on_time_delivery = 0 AND supplier IN ('Superior Materials', 'Reliable Suppliers Co')
SELECT SUM(total_cost) as total_delayed_cost FROM supply_chain WHERE on_time_delivery = 0 AND supplier IN ('Superior Materials', 'Reliable Suppliers Co')
components.title: Total Cost Impact
Delayed Order Details
components.sql_query: SELECT order_id, order_date, supplier, product, delivery_days, total_cost, shipping_mode FROM supply_chain WHERE on_time_delivery = 0 AND supplier IN ('Superior Materials', 'Reliable Suppliers Co')
SELECT supplier, AVG(delivery_days) as avg_delivery_days FROM supply_chain WHERE on_time_delivery = 0 AND supplier IN ('Superior Materials', 'Reliable Suppliers Co') GROUP BY supplier
components.title: Average Delivery Days by Supplier (Delayed)
Delays by Shipping Mode
components.sql_query: SELECT shipping_mode, COUNT(*) as order_count FROM supply_chain WHERE on_time_delivery = 0 AND supplier IN ('Superior Materials', 'Reliable Suppliers Co') GROUP BY shipping_mode

components.title: Total Delayed Orders
components.explanation: Total Delayed Orders: Displays a single metric value (1 data point)

components.title: Avg. Delivery Time (Delayed)
components.explanation: Avg. Delivery Time (Delayed): Displays a single metric value (1 data point)

components.title: Total Cost Impact
components.explanation: Total Cost Impact: Displays a single metric value (1 data point)

components.title: Delayed Order Details
components.explanation: Delayed Order Details: Shows 145 rows across 7 columns

components.title: Average Delivery Days by Supplier (Delayed)
components.explanation: Average Delivery Days by Supplier (Delayed): Compares 2 categories

components.title: Delays by Shipping Mode
components.explanation: Delays by Shipping Mode: Breaks down into 4 segments
